In response, the gang comes up with another larcenous plan - but reckons without the interventions of a fellow thief and a sultry Interpol agent. Crime caper sequel, starring George Clooney, Brad Pitt, Julia Roberts, Catherine Zeta-Jones, Matt Damon, Andy Garcia and Don Cheadle(n)

programme.title: Hot Tub Time Machine 2 (2015)
programme.desc: Three friends have used a time machine to change history in their favour, but when one of them gets shot at by a mysterious stranger, they decide to use the device to solve the mystery. They take a trip into the near future in search of answers, leading to an encounter with their friend's son. Comedy, starring Rob Corddry and Craig Robinson(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: A chance to buy goods from the comfort of home(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis reveals how CCTV and technological advances are helping to ensure convictions, focusing on criminals in London involved in robberies, thefts, drug crimes, street brawls and weapons offences. In Soho, police officers monitor the activity of the area's 100,000 nightly visitors from a CCTV control room in an underground bunker, while in Lambeth the air support unit is called in when an armed gang are seen rampaging through the streets(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A nurse with a social agenda is arrested on suspicion of performing illegal sterilisations on troubled teenagers without their knowledge - a policy that has resulted in the death of one patient. As McCoy and Borgia prepare their case against her, they discover former ADA Paul Robinette is planning to act for the defence(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The team tries to help a seriously injured and traumatised woman remember the events that led to the fatal shooting of her street dancer boyfriend in their hotel room. Mac pursues a lead suggesting the victim was killed by a rival artist - but Hawkes makes a breakthrough in the lab that indicates he was targeted by someone he should have been able to trust. Gary Sinise stars(n)

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: A man falls from a bridge in what appears to be a straightforward suicide, but lab results reveal he was shot in the chest before being thrown off. Hawkes dives into the Hudson River to search for the murder weapon, and discovers an antique that reveals the 'Compass killer' has returned and claimed his third victim. Crime drama, starring Hill Harper(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The facially scarred daughter of Lieutenant Van Buren's college friend is found dead, putting Fontana and Green on the trail of the assailant who had thrown acid in the victim's face months earlier. Meanwhile, ADA McCoy's prosecution is complicated by Van Buren's desperation(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A man is mysteriously killed after desecrating a treasured edition of the Hebrew Torah, brought from Poland to America. Detectives follow the trail to a man who confesses to the murder, but explains that his cousin paid the victim to defile the book. As ADA McCoy probes the family feud, he learns it may be linked to a lucrative property sale. Crime drama, with Sam Waterston, Allan Miller, Zach Grenier and Mark Feuerstein(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green are called in to investigate the murder of a notorious bounty hunter. Piecing together his final movements, they turn their attentions to a meeting between the victim and an ambitious journalist, which may be able to shed light on what happened(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A vial containing a sample of the Sars virus is stolen during a carjacking, leaving Briscoe and Green spearheading a wide-scale hunt for a man dubbed patient zero - the first victim to have contracted the illness. They finally home in on a female reporter who recently ended a long-term relationship with a virologist(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits the opera and finds that, amid the hysteria and emotion of the singing world, a murder has taken place that appears at first to be a case of self-defence. A world-famous tenor faces a battle to clear his name. Angela Lansbury and Keith Michell star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica finds herself in the middle of a wealthy family squabbling over the inheritance of a multi-millionaire, and spends the weekend at his isolated island retreat. As the arguments show no signs of abating, her host begins to fear for his life. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a bookmaker whose testimony led to the incarceration of a Mob boss 10 years previously. The trail leads to an apparently reputable businessman with a sideline in contract killing who appears to be taking orders from the Mafia. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Sam Waterston(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the case of a motivational speaker who died after being pushed from a hotel balcony, and find themselves caught up in a protest against gay adoption laws. Crime drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a decorated petty officer, whose body was found in a sports arena. The victim was discovered clutching a rifle, and it seems he had been engaged in a fire-fight, but when the agents fire the weapon, they discover it is a tranquilliser gun. A chain of evidence leads the investigators to a past kidnapping case involving another petty officer, who was last seen in Mexico. Meanwhile, Tammy Gregorio officially joins the team, as Pride seeks a way to get the FBI off his back(n)

programme.title: Private Eyes
programme.desc: Brothers Miles and Dylan fear their craft beer enterprise is being sabotaged, after they arrive at their premises to find their latest batch swirling down the drain. Angie and Matt talk to the woman behind Girl on a Bike, the previous Golden Tap winner, three years in a row. She admits she didn't think the boys deserved the accolade, but she was too busy accepting an offer from the mighty Laughlin Brewers to twist the knife on her rivals. Laughlin are known for their aggressive approach, and it seems they had their eye on Wayward Wally too. Comedy, starring Jason Priestley and Cindy Sampson(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a Romany boy proves difficult because of his community's distrust of outsiders. When detectives identify a neighbour as the prime suspect, it causes much distress within the close-knit group(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Amaro's friend reports that his 14-year-old daughter is missing, and the detectives learn she is working as a prostitute - so they set up a sting operation to catch the pimp, and also arrest an ageing American football player. Crimed drama, starring Danny Pino and Dann Florek(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives investigate the rape of an actress on stage during an interactive theatre production, only to discover the people in the audience - including her assailant - were all wearing masks. With no other leads, they are forced to track down an obsessive fan of the victim, who filmed the crime. Starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The CEO of a private military contractor is found drugged and sexually assaulted in a park, but Benson and Amaro's investigation is hampered by the victim's unwillingness to cooperate. As the case progresses, they uncover a much larger crime and conspiracy in Iraq. Drama, starring Mariska Hargitay and Danny Pino(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: Jaruszalski and Morales investigate when thieves known to be part of a crime ring turn their attention away from robbery and toward assault and murder. A spoiled young actress is suspected of being involved, her role being to keep the victims entertained and out of their houses while the rest of the gang gets to work. Crime drama, starring Corey Stoll and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A woman who suffered a miscarriage of justice during an arson case goes on trial for murdering her abusive former cellmate, and the case could have embarrassing repercussions for Winters' wife, a retired police officer who was one of the detectives who helped place the accused behind bars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Part two of two. As Seth lies critically ill in hospital, the doctor reveals he was poisoned, but Jessica suspects someone else was the intended victim and decides to confront Eudora. Jean Simmons guest stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A trip to Paris - and a chance encounter with a British agent friend - sees Jessica re-routed to Athens, where she gets embroiled in an intriguing mix of murder and espionage. Richard Todd and Ian Ogilvy guest star, with Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Cabot Cove's new priest takes a murderer's confession, and asks Jessica to help him uncover the truth without breaking his sacred oath of absolute confidentiality. Starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The death of an elderly writer prompts Jessica to recall an intriguing mystery that happened aboard the Queen Mary some 50 years previously. Guest starring Robert Vaughn, with Angela Lansbury and June Havoc(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits Palm Springs to check on an investment and finds herself drawn into solving the murder of a property developer. She initially believes the dead man's wife is guilty of the crime, but the suspect's subsequent suicide complicates matters further. Elliott Gould guest stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica Fletcher recounts the unusual tale of a private eye who reluctantly recruited a new partner in the form of a French poodle, which once belonged to a murder victim. Whodunit, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A volunteer firefighter is found dead in a burnt-out furniture store. However, Jessica's suspicions are aroused when the post-mortem suggests he was deceased before the blaze started. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: The son of a Jamaican plantation owner marries the daughter of a local voodoo priest, leading to accusations, recriminations and murder - which is just the ticket for Jessica Fletcher, who happens to be on the island at the time. Angela Lansbury stars(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica visits the opera and finds that, amid the hysteria and emotion of the singing world, a murder has taken place that appears at first to be a case of self-defence. A world-famous tenor faces a battle to clear his name. Angela Lansbury and Keith Michell star(n)

programme.title: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: Jessica finds herself in the middle of a wealthy family squabbling over the inheritance of a multi-millionaire, and spends the weekend at his isolated island retreat. As the arguments show no signs of abating, her host begins to fear for his life. Drama, starring Angela Lansbury(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Director Vance charges DiNozzo with a special assignment to go to France, locate Admiral Kendall's wayward daughter Amanda and bring her home. Arriving in Marseille, Tony immediately heads to the local NCIS office, only to find five dead agents. After eventually tracking down Amanda, the pair embark on a rollercoaster ride to the relative safety of the nearest NCIS office in Spain. Michael Weatherly stars(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs travels to his home town after hearing news of his father's death, while the team investigates whether a fire on a US Navy ship was accidental or planned. The vessel served as prison to several members of the Brotherhood of Doubt terrorist group, whom Gibbs was responsible for catching. After the blaze, two of those members are missing. Tony argues that Gibbs would want to know, but Vance does not want him disturbed at this difficult time. Mark Harmon stars(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The naval crime drama spin-off returns, picking up with Pride and his team in the wake of the departure of Meredith Brody, who left for good after a close call with a terrorist. Concerns are raised about whether the unit has been irreparably compromised, and FBI special agent Tammy Gregorio is assigned to discover the truth. However, the agents are quickly given a chance to prove their effectiveness, as they co-ordinate with various other federal agencies to track down a sniper targeting special events across New Orleans. Starring Scott Bakula(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Boyd Hartwell, a hedge fund manager away in Hong Kong on business, is forced to watch helplessly as a video call home is interrupted by an intruder, who proceeds to rape and kidnap his wife. A ransom is issued, demaning that Boyd offer up 250,000 dollars for the safe return of his spouse, but when the person collecting the money turns out to be the missing wife herself, Benson and the team realise there might be more to this case than they initially suspected. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The detectives try to track down a serial rapist, but have to contend with neighbourhood watch members who become vigilantes. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A baby goes missing, allegedly taken unwittingly by thieves who were unaware it was strapped into the back seat of a car they stole. Benson and Amaro gather statements from the anxious mother and her boyfriend - but discrepancies in their accounts raise suspicions. Crime drama, starring Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A music student is raped at gunpoint in her apartment - but although the SVU squad is quick to make an arrest, high-profile defence attorney Bayard Ellis tries to undermine prosecution evidence and damage the victim's credibility. Drama, guest starring Sofia Vassilieva(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: A professional surfer is found dead in his shop, and as Morales sets out to expose the killer, he discovered the victim had an illicit side-line in medicinal marijuana. Crime drama, starring Skeet Ulrich and Alfred Molina(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Los Angeles
programme.desc: An explosion claims the lives of two young children who were waiting in their car while their mother delivered something to a house. Initial inquiries reveal that the owner was cooking meth in his garage, but the case changes course when it becomes apparent that what was actually being stored were the ingredients to make a bomb. Evidence leads the team to an address where officers find evidence of a cell of white American Muslims with plans to bomb Los Angeles airport. Starring Corey Stoll and Skeet Ulrich(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Dead Weight (1971)
programme.desc: The dishevelled detective suspects a highly respected general is guilty of murdering an associate who was about to expose the war hero's shady business dealings, but Columbo has a hard time backing up his hunch with evidence because of the lack of a body or a weapon. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Eddie Albert, Suzanne Pleshette and John Kerr(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Grand Deceptions (1989)
programme.desc: An army colonel who embezzled money from his superior officer to fund arms sales becomes the target of a blackmail attempt when his crimes are discovered. The crooked officer kills the extortionist and makes it look like an accident, but the crumpled cop is soon on his case. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Robert Foxworth and Janet Elber(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Murder, Smoke and Shadows (1989)
programme.desc: An ambitious Hollywood director is visited by an old friend, who threatens to expose evidence of his involvement in the death of an actor. The film-maker resorts to murder to keep his dark secret safe, only to end up on the receiving end of Columbo's distinctive brand of interrogation. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Fisher Stevens and Molly Hagan(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Suitable for Framing (1971)
programme.desc: A millionaire art collector is thought to have been killed as the result of a random burglary. However, Columbo is convinced the dead man's nephew committed the crime to avoid being written out of the will, and embarks on a mission to ensnare his suspect. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Ross Martin and Don Ameche(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Playback (1975)
programme.desc: An inventor tries to stop his mother-in-law from exposing his infidelities by murdering her in front of a security camera - and tampering with the recording to make it look like the killing occurred at a time when he had an alibi. However, Columbo sees through his hi-tech ruse and tries to expose the truth. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Oskar Werner and Gena Rowlands(n)

programme.title: Columbo: The Most Crucial Game (1972)
programme.desc: The owner of an American football team is found dead in a swimming pool, and his drowning is regarded as an accident. The down-at-heel detective is convinced that foul play was involved and sets out to prove his case - but his chief suspect has a cast-iron alibi that places him miles away from the scene of the crime. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk and Robert Culp(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: Following their investigation into departed agent Brody's relationship with terrorist John Russo, the FBI continues to cause trouble for the team. This time, the bureau turns its attention to a homicide case, in which Pride's friend Elvis Bertrand, a US Navy intelligence analyst, has been labelled the prime suspect. Determined to keep the matter within the Navy, Pride and his colleagues manage to get hold of crucial evidence, forcing the FBI to work with them(n)

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans
programme.desc: The team investigates the death of a decorated petty officer, whose body was found in a sports arena. The victim was discovered clutching a rifle, and it seems he had been engaged in a fire-fight, but when the agents fire the weapon, they discover it is a tranquilliser gun. A chain of evidence leads the investigators to a past kidnapping case involving another petty officer, who was last seen in Mexico. Meanwhile, Tammy Gregorio officially joins the team, as Pride seeks a way to get the FBI off his back(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A candidate for the next New York mayoral elections finds her campaign in jeopardy when Goren and Eames investigate her husband on suspicion of hiring a hitman to kill a judge. However, evidence resulting from a tip-off and the discovery of a second body may be a little too neat - and instead indicate a conspiracy. Xander Berkeley guest stars, with Vincent D'Onofrio and Kathryn Erbe(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A missing teenager leads the team to a man preying on the daughters he fathered through a sperm bank. Starring BD Wong, James Van Der Beek and Eric Close(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: After witnessing a kidnapping, Rollins discovers the abductee was a 19-year-old woman involved in the world of body modification. When her leg is found in a canal, the detectives learn another limb was also discovered in the same area 11 years previously, and the same technique was used to sever it. Crime drama, starring Kelli Giddish and Mariska Hargitay(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Cragen goes undercover when a murder in Brighton Beach leads the team to a thriving mail-order bride business, and hopes to hunt down the killer. Elsewhere, the detectives expose a blackmail scam run by the Russian Mafia. Crime drama, guest starring Timothy Busfield and Izabella Miko(n)

programme.desc: Catherine Gee comes to the aid of a management consultant looking for a perfect property in Portugal on a budget of £600,000(n)

programme.desc: A two-bedroom maisonette in Lakeside, near Cardiff in Wales and a shop with a two-bedroom flat upstairs in need of retail therapy(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Paul Laidlaw and Claire Rawle set off on the final road trip leg from the Derbyshire town of Matlock. Militaria mad Paul hopes a late 17th-century hand-forged halberd head earns him a huge profit. Claire buys a Chinese cloisonné vase and an Edwardian inkstand. Paul also unravels the story behind the world-famous crooked church tower at Chesterfield and Claire meets a relative of the first man to circumnavigate Australia, who hails from the Lincolnshire town of Donnington. The pressure is on at the final auction in Stamford, Lincolnshire.(n)

programme.title: French Collection

Siobhan identifies a retro tapestry that could be a money-spinner, Raj creates a personalised table top by printing a photograph onto MDF, and Lyn overhauls a 100-year-old cot. The items are later put up for auction in Shoreditch, London(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: The experts fly out to Spain to offer assistance to expatriate amateurs whose projects have gone horribly wrong. programme.desc: A 999 call from a teenager sparks a race against time for Nadiene and volunteer Matt. When confronted with an aggressive man, the pair are forced to hit their emergency buttons(n)
